summary: Decompiled and typed a substantial slice of the Kinoko Route ground module, replacing several grKinokoRoute target stubs with C, adding stage data/static data, and introducing stage-specific Ground gv structs. The decomp.dev bot reported +760 matched code bytes and +16 matched data bytes, including new 100% matches for grKinokoRoute_8020836C, .sdata, grKinokoRoute_8020754C, and grKinokoRoute_80208564, while larger route/camera callbacks improved but remained partial.

key_files.role: Main decomp work: added grNKr static data, StageData, and C implementations for multiple grKinokoRoute callbacks.
Added grKinokoRoute_GroundVars, grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2, and union entries on Ground::gv.
Replaced unknown prototype for grKinokoRoute_8020836C with void grKinokoRoute_8020836C(HSD_GObj*, s32).

what_changed: Replaced target markers with C for grKinokoRoute_80207634, grKinokoRoute_802078F0, grKinokoRoute_80207B5C, grKinokoRoute_80207C88, and grKinokoRoute_8020836C.
Added grNKr static data: zero Vec3 grNKr_803B82E8, 51-entry depth table grNKr_803B82F4 wrapped in grNKr_Depths, file path string "/GrNKr.dat", and StageData grNKr_803E584C for KINOKOROUTE.
Added Kinoko Route ground variable structs with entries[4] holding Vec3 pos plus HSD_JObj*, and kinokoroute2 state fields flags, phase, spawn_idx, zone_idx, cam_timer, and reb0_pos.
grKinokoRoute_80207634 now records four route JObjs 0x7F-0x82 relative to origin JObj 0x94 and adjusts camera bounds using Stage_GetCamBounds*Offset and Ground_801C3880/3890/38A0/38AC.

grKinokoRoute_802078F0 now tracks the current fighter position via Ground_801C57A4 and ftLib_80086644, applies inverse stage scale from Ground_801C0498, and updates the stored route JObj translations.

grKinokoRoute_80207B5C now initializes a route ground object: map animation, callbacks, flags, kinokoroute2 phase/timer/spawn state, material setup through grKinokoRoute_80208564, and saved reb0_pos from JObj 4.

grKinokoRoute_80207C88 now implements a large route/camera state update: fighter position clamping, spawn_idx detection through Ground_801C3DB4, stage_info.x6DC zone updates, ground object refreshes, camera target interpolation, grZakoGenerator calls, and mpLib refresh on a one-shot flag.

grKinokoRoute_8020836C now toggles JObj 0x53 visibility/collision-material state, adds/removes mp joints 0x3C, 0x33, and 0xC-0xF, and iterates HSD_GObj_Entities->items for item kind 0xA0 material changes.
grKinokoRoute_80208564 was refined to use GET_GROUND(gobj) and a static grNKr_Depths copy instead of a direct gobj->user_data access and local depth literal.
smart_moves: Promoted inferred per-stage state into typed Ground gv structs before using it throughout the callbacks, making offsets such as gp+C4, gp+C6, gp+C8, gp+CA, gp+CC, and gp+D0 explicit and reusable.
Moved the 51-entry depth list into a static const wrapped struct and copied it locally in grKinokoRoute_80208564, a common data/codegen tactic for matching stack and rodata behavior.
Added the missing StageData and "/GrNKr.dat" string alongside existing StageCallbacks, which improved .data/.sdata matching instead of only focusing on function bodies.
Kept exact low-level matching aids where needed: PAD_STACK(16) in grKinokoRoute_8020836C and HSD_ASSERT line numbers 467, 617, and 654 around required JObj assumptions.

Used project conventions such as GET_GROUND(gobj), typed HSD_GObj/Ground_GObj arguments, and an explicit StageData function-pointer cast for grKinokoRoute_8020741C rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
decomp_lessons: Stage decomp often requires matching the module data table and asset path string, not just replacing target stubs; grNKr_803E584C and grNKr_803E5840 contributed to data matching here.
When a Ground::gv layout becomes clear, add small stage-specific structs in types.h and wire them into the union; this makes callback code cleaner and tends to stabilize future matching work.
For arrays that originally live in data/rodata, wrapping the array in a named struct can reproduce compiler layout and access patterns better than a plain local literal.

Route/camera stage callbacks may combine fighter-state queries, camera offset helpers, collision/spawn index helpers, and stage_info fields; preserving exact integer field widths and magic constants matters for partial matches.

Visibility/collision toggles can involve both JObj flags and mp joint list changes plus item material updates; search item iteration and itGetKind checks before naming such helper behavior too narrowly.
The evidence has no human PR body or review discussion, so intent beyond the diff and bot match report should be treated as inferred.
naming_conventions: Stage globals retained address-style grNKr_* names, e.g. grNKr_803B82E8, grNKr_803B82F4, grNKr_803E5840, and grNKr_803E584C.
Functions retained the established grKinokoRoute_8020xxxx naming pattern until semantic names are known.

New ground variable types use struct grKinokoRoute_GroundVars, struct grKinokoRoute_GroundVars_Entry, and struct grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2, with lowercase Ground::gv union fields kinokoroute and kinokoroute2.
Meaningful inferred fields were named phase, spawn_idx, zone_idx, cam_timer, and reb0_pos; less-certain bit state remained flags with explicit padding.
The static depth table type was named grNKr_Depths with member x[51], reflecting weak semantic knowledge while preserving layout.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(16) in grKinokoRoute_8020836C to satisfy stack layout.
Used static const Vec3 grNKr_803B82E8 as a zero initializer for local fighter_pos in grKinokoRoute_80207C88.
Used grNKr_Depths depths = grNKr_803B82F4 and depths.x[i] in grKinokoRoute_80208564 to match the depth-table access pattern.
Preserved exact magic constants and JObj/map IDs such as 0x94, 0x7F-0x82, 4, 0xBD, 0x53, 0x3C, 0x33, 0xC-0xF, item kind 0xA0, and timer 0x3C.
Kept HSD_ASSERT calls with original-looking line numbers and boolean shapes for required JObjs.
Used an explicit cast in StageData: (void (*)(int)) grKinokoRoute_8020741C.
review_feedback: No human review comments or PR body were present in the slice.
The decomp.dev bot reported matched code 65.04% (+0.02%, +760 bytes) and matched data 38.57% (+16 bytes).
Bot-reported new 100% matches: grKinokoRoute_8020836C, .sdata, grKinokoRoute_8020754C, and grKinokoRoute_80208564.

Bot-reported partial improvements included grKinokoRoute_80207C88 to 85.48%, grKinokoRoute_80207634 to 92.71%, grKinokoRoute_802078F0 to 95.98%, grKinokoRoute_80207B5C to 91.15%, .data to 88.68%, .sdata2 to 71.79%, and .rodata to 97.44%.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish or rename grKinokoRoute_80207C88 after this 85.48% partial match.
Search grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2 or kinokoroute2 to validate field names and offsets against later decomp work.
Search grNKr_803E584C and "/GrNKr.dat" for final StageData naming conventions in other stage modules.
Search stage_info.x6DC plus zone_idx to understand how route stages expose camera/zone state globally.
Search grKinokoRoute_8020836C, item kind 0xA0, grMaterial_801C8E08, and grMaterial_801C8E28 for the material/collision toggle pattern.
